---
title: "PREVENT-AD Family History"
format: html
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warnings = FALSE)
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = here::here())
```

```{r setting}
library(ggpubr)
library(missForest)

source('workflow/scripts/config.R')
source(CRS_FN)

fhx_raw <- readRDS(file.path(DATA_INTERMEDIATE_PATH, "PREVENTAD_fhx_raw.rds"))
lifestyle_raw <- readRDS(file.path(DATA_OUTPUT_PATHS$data$cleaned, "PREVENTAD_lifestyle_imp_raw.rds"))
biomarkers <- readRDS(file.path(DATA_INTERMEDIATE_PATH, "PREVENTAD_biomarkers.rds"))
PREVENTAD_dat <- readRDS(file.path(DATA_INTERMEDIATE_PATH, "PREVENTAD_dat.rds"))
```

# Coding extensive family history variable
```{r}
dat_fhx <- fhx_raw %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(FDR_AD = sum(father_dx_ad_dementia, 
                                 mother_dx_ad_dementia, 
                                 sibling_dx_ad_dementia_count, na.rm=TRUE),
         other_family_members_AD = if_else(is.na(other_family_members_AD), 
                                           0, 
                                           other_family_members_AD),
         other_maternal_family_members_AD = if_else(is.na(other_maternal_family_members_AD), 
                                                    0, 
                                                    other_maternal_family_members_AD),
         other_paternal_family_members_AD = if_else(is.na(other_paternal_family_members_AD), 
                                                    0, 
                                                    other_paternal_family_members_AD),
         # binary: extensive fhx AD == 1; no extensive fhx AD == 0
         ext_relatives_AD = if_else(other_family_members_AD > 0, 1, 0),
         
         # earliest age of onset
         min_family_onset = pmin(
           father_onset_age,
           mother_onset_age,
           sibling_onset_age_1,  
           sibling_onset_age_2,
           sibling_onset_age_3,
           na.rm = TRUE
           ),
         
         # single comprehensive fhx variable
         fhx_burden = case_when(
           # 3 = high
           FDR_AD >= 3 ~ 3,
           FDR_AD >= 2 & !is.na(min_family_onset) & min_family_onset < 65 ~ 3,
           !is.na(min_family_onset) & min_family_onset < 60 ~ 3,
           
           # 2 = moderate
           FDR_AD >= 2 ~ 2,
           !is.na(min_family_onset) & min_family_onset >= 60 & min_family_onset < 65 ~ 2,
           
           # 1 = low
           FDR_AD == 1 ~ 1
           ) %>% as.factor()
         ) %>%
  relocate(FDR_AD, .after=CONP_ID) %>%
  relocate(other_family_members_AD, .after=FDR_AD) %>%
  relocate(other_maternal_family_members_AD, .after=other_family_members_AD) %>%
  relocate(other_paternal_family_members_AD, .after=other_maternal_family_members_AD) %>%
  relocate(ext_relatives_AD, .after=FDR_AD) %>%
  relocate(min_family_onset, .after=ext_relatives_AD) %>%
  relocate(fhx_burden, .after=min_family_onset)

#saveRDS(dat_fhx, file.path(DATA_OUTPUT_PATHS$data$intermediate, "PREVENTAD_fhx_dat.rds"))
```

# Family history table
```{r}

```

# Checking association of family history burden and biomarker levels

## Recoded family history variable vs biomarker levels

```{r}
df1 <- dat_fhx %>%
  left_join((biomarkers %>%
               group_by(CONP_ID) %>%
               slice(1)),
            by="CONP_ID") 
  
df1_longer <- df1 %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(ptau181_simoa_UGOT, ptau217_simoa_UGOT, AB_ratio_simoa_4plex,
             NFL_simoa_4plex, GFAP_simoa_4plex),
    names_to = "biomarker",
    values_to = "measure"
  ) %>%
  select(names(dat_fhx), biomarker, measure) %>%
  mutate(fhx_burden = factor(fhx_burden,
                             levels=c(1, 2, 3),
                             labels=c("Low", "Moderate", "High"))) %>%
  mutate(ext_relatives_AD = factor(ext_relatives_AD,
                                   levels=c(0, 1),
                                   labels=c("No", "Yes")))

pval_df1 <- df1_longer %>%
  group_by(biomarker) %>%
  summarise(
    p_value = tryCatch({
      anova(lm(measure ~ fhx_burden))$`Pr(>F)`[1]
    }, error = function(e) NA_real_),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(p_value)) %>%
  mutate(p_label = case_when(
    p_value < 0.001 ~ "p < 0.001",
    p_value < 0.01 ~ paste0("p = ", round(p_value, 3)),
    TRUE ~ paste0("p = ", round(p_value, 2))
  ))

plot1 <- ggplot(df1_longer, aes(x=fhx_burden, y=measure, fill=fhx_burden)) +
  geom_violin(alpha=0.7) +
  geom_boxplot(width=0.1, fill="white") +
  facet_wrap(~ biomarker, scales="free") +
  # stat_compare_means(
  #   comparisons = list(c("Low", "Moderate"),
  #                      c("Moderate", "High"),
  #                      c("Low", "High")),
  #   method="t.test",
  #   p.adjust.method = "bonferroni",
  #   label.x=1.5,
  #   size = 1.5
  # ) +
  geom_text(data = pval_df1,
            aes(2, Inf, label = p_label),
            vjust = 2,
            size = 3,
            inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  # stat_compare_means(method="anova",
  #                    #hjust=2,
  #                    #vjust=2,
  #                    size=3) +
  labs(x = "Family History Burden Level",
       y = "Biomarker Level (pg/mL or AB ratio)",
       title = "Biomarker Levels by AD Family History Burden") +
  theme(legend.position="none")
plot1
```

## Binary extended family members variable vs biomarker levels

```{r}
pval_df2 <- df1_longer %>%
  group_by(biomarker) %>%
  summarise(
    p_value = tryCatch({
      anova(lm(measure ~ ext_relatives_AD))$`Pr(>F)`[1]
    }, error = function(e) NA_real_),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(p_value)) %>%
  mutate(p_label = case_when(
    p_value < 0.001 ~ "p < 0.001",
    p_value < 0.01 ~ paste0("p = ", round(p_value, 3)),
    TRUE ~ paste0("p = ", round(p_value, 2))
  ))

plot2 <- ggplot(df1_longer, aes(x=ext_relatives_AD, 
                                y=measure, 
                                fill=ext_relatives_AD)) +
  geom_violin(alpha=0.7) +
  geom_boxplot(width=0.1, fill="white") +
  facet_wrap(~ biomarker, scales="free") +
  # stat_compare_means(
  #   # comparisons = list(c("Low", "Moderate"),
  #   #                    c("Moderate", "High"),
  #   #                    c("Low", "High")),
  #   method="wilcox.test",
  #   #label.x=1.5,
  #   size = 2
  # ) + 
  geom_text(data = pval_df2,
            aes(1.5, Inf, label = p_label),
            vjust = 2,
            size = 3,
            inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  labs(x = "Extended Relatives with AD",
       y = "Biomarker Level (pg/mL or AB ratio)",
       title = "Biomarker Levels by AD in Extended Family") +
  theme(legend.position="none")
plot2
```

## Number of extended family members with AD vs biomarker levels

```{r}
pval_df3 <- df1_longer %>%
  group_by(biomarker) %>%
  summarise(
    p_value = tryCatch({
      anova(lm(measure ~ other_family_members_AD))$`Pr(>F)`[1]
    }, error = function(e) NA_real_),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(p_value)) %>%
  mutate(p_label = case_when(
    p_value < 0.001 ~ "p < 0.001",
    p_value < 0.01 ~ paste0("p = ", round(p_value, 3)),
    TRUE ~ paste0("p = ", round(p_value, 2))
  ))

plot3 <- ggplot(df1_longer, aes(x=as.factor(other_family_members_AD), 
                                y=measure, 
                                fill=as.factor(other_family_members_AD))) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha=0.7) +
  facet_wrap(~ biomarker, scales="free") +
  # stat_compare_means(
  #   # comparisons = list(c("Low", "Moderate"),
  #   #                    c("Moderate", "High"),
  #   #                    c("Low", "High")),
  #   method="wilcox.test",
  #   #label.x=1.5,
  #   size = 2
  # ) + 
  geom_text(data = pval_df3,
            aes(4, Inf, label = p_label),
            vjust = 2,
            size = 3,
            inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  labs(x = "# of Extended Relatives with AD",
       y = "Biomarker Level (pg/mL or AB ratio)",
       title = "Biomarker Levels by AD in Extended Family") +
  theme(legend.position="none")
plot3
```
